headline: Publishing Industry Under Attack: Global AI Bot Activity Surges by 300%, Akamai Report Finds
summary: The sector ranks second globally in AI bot activity, with most attacks targeting publishing organizationsCAMBRIDGE, Mass., April 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) released a new State of the Internet (SOTI) report examining how AI bots are reshaping the digital publishing ecosystem. Protecting Publishing: Navigating the AI Bot Era finds that AI bot activity surged by 300% in 2025, with the media industry, which includes publishing companies — ranking second globally with 13% of
